name: Akira Kogane
bio: Believing in the power of compassion and understanding, Akira seeks to bridge the gaps between individuals and communities.
speech_style: Leisurely drawling, with a hint of wisdom

name: Eriko Nagata
bio: Eriko believes in the importance of questioning assumptions and seeking truth. She encourages others to do the same, fostering a culture of curiosity.

name: Taro Hirota
bio: Taro envisions a world where individuals are free to forge their own paths. He seeks to empower others to take control of their destinies.
speech_style: Passionate and persuasive, with a touch of conviction

name: 賢者3
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
